mapper.select:
select id, avatar, username, phone, email, role, status, intro, create_time as createTime from user
is_deleted = 0
and username like concat('%', #{username}, '%')
and phone like concat('%', #{phone}, '%')
and status = #{status}
order by create_time desc
select id, avatar, username, phone, email, role, status, intro, create_time as createTime from user where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0 limit 1
